personal.name: Muhammed Abbas
personal.tagline: Crafting polished, high-performance web applications with modern technologies.
personal.about: I am a dedicated MERN Stack Developer with comprehensive training from Brototype, Kochi. I specialize in bridging the gap between elegant frontend interfaces and robust backend architectures. By leveraging technologies like React, Node.js, and MongoDB, I build highly responsive and scalable digital experiences. My focus is on writing clean, efficient code and continually expanding my technical horizons to solve complex real-world problems.

education.title: MERN Stack Development
education.description: Intensive, hands-on training focused on full-stack web development. Mastered MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js through complex, real-world project builds and rigorous architectural training.

education.title: Higher Secondary Education (+2)
education.description: Completed core foundational studies with a strong emphasis on analytical thinking and problem-solving, setting the stage for a deep dive into software engineering.

projects.title: NexaBid
projects.description: My main project—A highly scalable, real-time bidding and auction platform designed to handle significant user concurrency.

projects.title: Cancer Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: An AI-powered mini-project that utilizes deep learning principles to detect and triage instances of skin cancer.

projects.title: Tesla & SpaceX Clones
projects.description: Pixel-perfect front-end clones of the Tesla and SpaceX websites, demonstrating precision in responsive styling and layouts.

projects.title: User Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive backend and frontend system for securely managing user authentication, sessions, and roles.
